cdsiSource: Pneumococcal 4-dose, Start at 12 months, Start at 24 months, Risk 2-5 years 4-dose

cases.description: 4-dose primary: D1 at 2mo, D2 at 4mo, D3 at 6mo, D4 booster at 12-15mo
cases.rationale: CDSI 4-dose D1 minAge=42d (6w), recAge=60d (2mo). Code line 184.

cases.description: PCV20 (Prevnar 20): single dose completes series — no PPSV23 needed
cases.rationale: PediVax usedPCV20 logic line 179-181: 1 dose of PCV20 = series complete. CDSI does not enumerate PCV20 separately but ACIP confirms 1-dose PCV20 closes the series for high-risk ≥2y.
CDSI 4-dose D4 minAge=360d (12mo), prefInt=56d. Code line 188-192.

cases.description: 16-59mo catch-up: min interval 8w between catch-up doses
cases.rationale: CDSI Start-at-12-months D2 prefInt=56d. Code line 193-196 sets minInt: 56.

cases.description: ≥2y high-risk PCV: 1 dose PCV20 (or PCV15 + PPSV23 follow-up)
cases.rationale: CDSI 'Risk 2-5 years 4-dose' starts at 730d (2y). Code line 197-201 emits risk-based PCV at am>=24.
